draft.text: The stealth-easing read doesn't match the curve. Bills still clear 3.702% against notes at 3.212%, a 49bps front-end inversion that signals tight funding, not quiet loosening — market calm is leading the rate structure, not confirming it. The thesis flips only if that spread compresses toward zero.
